task_completion.description: Add Tiputini ground station with correct coordinates and altitude
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit Ground Station' window or the ground station list in GPredict showing 'Tiputini' with Latitude 0.6383 S (or -0.6383), Longitude 76.1492 W (or -76.1492), and Altitude 220m.

task_completion.description: Add Manaus ground station with correct coordinates and altitude
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit Ground Station' window or the ground station list in GPredict showing 'Manaus' with Latitude 3.1131 S (or -3.1131), Longitude 60.0253 W (or -60.0253), and Altitude 92m.

task_completion.description: Create 'Bio_Relay' tracking module with specific satellites
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a GPredict module window or configuration screen titled 'Bio_Relay' that actively lists the satellites ISS (ZARYA), SO-50, AO-91, and AO-92.

task_completion.description: Create 'Trop_Weather' tracking module with specific satellites
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a GPredict module window or configuration screen titled 'Trop_Weather' that actively lists the satellites GOES 16, NOAA 19, and SUOMI NPP.

task_completion.description: Set Tiputini as the default ground station
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences window under 'Ground Stations' showing Tiputini selected as the default, or the main UI indicating Tiputini is the active default QTH.
Look at the list of available ground stations in the GPredict settings, preferences, or module configuration; 'Pittsburgh' must be absent from the list.

integrity.description: Agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GPredict graphical user interface being interacted with (e.g., dialog boxes, menus), rather than just terminal commands editing configuration files.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual GPredict application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown must be GPredict, not a text editor, web browser, or dummy window containing the task text.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text file
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) simply containing the list of satellites or coordinates.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Tiputini coordinates: -0.6383 (0.6383 S), -76.1492 (76.1492 W), altitude 220m. Manaus coordinates: -3.1131 (3.1131 S), -60.0253 (60.0253 W), altitude 92m. Bio_Relay satellites: ISS (25544), SO-50 (27607), AO-91 (43017), AO-92 (43137). Trop_Weather satellites: GOES 16 (41866), NOAA 19 (33591), SUOMI NPP (37849). Default ground station (QTH) must be Tiputini.
